questions.text:
If other nations were to use satellite-destruction practices similar to China's, then the MOST LIKELY result would be

When satellites become obsolete, they are typically guided back into the atmosphere where they are destroyed. However, in January 2007, China used a ground-based missile to destroy one of its obsolete satellites that was orbiting Earth.

questions.text:
The reason traditional ballpoint ink pens did not work in space was due to

Early astronauts relied on pencils for recording data in space because traditional ballpoint ink pens would not work in space. During the late 1960s, a new type of ink pen was invented for astronaut use and is still used in space as well as on Earth.
